doc_title: Pseudonymisation Under the GDPR — EDPB Guidelines 01/2025
label: fabricated
reason: The European Data Protection Board has not issued a "Guidelines 01/2025 on Pseudonymisation," and the cited adoption and consultation timeline is fictitious.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The European Data Protection Board (EDPB) has not released "Guidelines 01/2025 on Pseudonymisation" as of the current date, and the numbering and adoption timeline provided are inconsistent with official EDPB publication records.
